prompts: Radio static carries a broken SOS. Who answers, and what does it cost?
A safehouse goes dark. The locks are intact. What do you do?
A convoy is rumored to be moving through Raven Creek tonight. Who is watching the roads?
Supplies are running low. What’s the plan for a risky salvage run?
A new faction flag appears overnight. Who raised it?
A survivor returns with a map covered in new markings. Who trusts it?
The rain won’t stop. Morale cracks. What keeps the group together?
A single gunshot echoes at dusk. Who investigates?
A stranger offers medicine for information. Who trades?
Your safehouse door is open when you wake. What happened?
A generator fails mid‑storm. Who fixes it?
A coded message repeats on the emergency band. Who can decrypt it?
